reviews.comment:
Siempre hay una cola de mínimo 100 metros a la hora que pases, los playeros atienden con la misma velocidad que un caracol resfriado, o sea que tenés entre 30 min. a 1 hora para cargar nafta siempre a la hora que sea. La peor estación de servicio que he visto en mi vida.

(Translated by Google)
There's always a line at least 100 meters long no matter what time you go. The attendants are as slow as a snail with a cold, meaning you'll have to wait between 30 minutes and an hour to fill up, no matter the time of day. The worst gas station I've ever seen.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvbDhYaTJRRRAB
